nodes.name: Every Monday 6AM
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday morning to sync new/updated Shopify products to Walmart

nodes.name: Send to Walmart API
nodes.notes: ⚠️ Requires Walmart Seller API credentials. Currently in logging mode. See node for setup instructions.
